title: Apex Waters
description: The Great White shark has arrived, you no longer are at the top of the food chain.
body:
# Apex Waters

The Great White is lurking...

![Shark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2a12ac918e2e0502233d3c63fdce0a51de0da40_0.webp)

## Features
- Custom Great White Shark entity that naturally spawns across all ocean biomes (except frozen)
- Dynamic hunger system — hunger initializes at a random level and depletes over time, triggering a deadly hunting mode when it hits zero
- Retaliates when attacked — don't pick a fight you can't finish
- Blood scent mechanic — the shark becomes aggressive when a nearby player is low on health

## Configuration
A built-in config file lets you fine-tune the experience to your liking — adjust HP, damage, whether the shark should target players in boats, and much more.

## Compatibility
Designed to work seamlessly with any mod pack. Compatible with all custom mobs and biomes out of the box.

## Credits
Huge thanks to @HotWizard for all of the artwork — model, textures, and animations.


## Modpacks
You can use the mod in your modpacks as long as I get credit for the mod.


## Bug report
Encountered a compatibility issue or something feels off? Report it on [Github](https://github.com/acorsicanfrog/apexwaters) and I'll get to it as soon as I can.
